title: Arena Champion
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ArenaEntrance.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Entrance to the Kerritamba Village Arena.]]
'''Arena Champion''' was a title granted to individuals who defeated all challenges of the [[Kerritamba Village Arena]], including the reigning Arena Champion. The Arena itself was located near the [[Kerritamba Village]], in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. [[Kerritamba Village|Kerritamba]] highly respected its Arena Champions. Several rewards existed for Arena Champions, ranging from general respect to a badge of accomplishment awarded by the village chief. Two recorded Arena Champions were [[Wirartu]] and an unidentified individual who helped [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kerritamba]] complete certain tasks.
